reason:
These systems are all running various versions of ESXI that are currently unsupported by Broadcomm.
We are now in the process of migrating these systems to a supported version of Proxmox. This will involve wiping and reprovisioning them, which are in process and occurring this summer and likely through the fall.
riskAssessment: These systems provide infrastructure for Lerner College operations and curriculum support, as well as some web presence for the college.
dataLevelStored: Level II - Moderate impact: 'official use' information (eg., work emails, internal docs)
dataLevelStoredSpecified: Other information as specified by contractual, legal or other requirements
dataAccessLevel: Level II - Moderate impact: 'official use' information (eg., work emails, internal docs)
dataAccessLevelSpecified: Other information as specified by contractual, legal or other requirements
impactedSystems:
Virtual desktop machines for graduate students to perform research activities (21.100) (Level 2)
Curriculum support services, print services, web servers, virtual desktops for professors for testing curriculum and research software without affecting their PCs - (ntx01, ntx02, ntx03) (Level 2)
mitigation: Host VMs either have crowdstrike or tenable on them as applicable. Windows VMs are AD bound and only allow access to specific users, and are managed via kace.
